Test Description: Register default/readability/writability verification across GPIO GP0[8:39] and group registers
Remarks: DIN default read masking note present in code comments
Test Steps / Procedure: 1) Invoke chk_rst_val(): iterate i=0..48 over addr_array; for each address: if skip_rst_array[i]==1, continue; if read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000, continue; read data_rd=read_reg(addr); compute data=(data_rd & 0xfffffffe); compare with default_value_array[i]; on mismatch: def_fail_cnt++ and print failure; 2) Invoke chk_rd_wr(): for j in 0..5 with chk_val={0xffffffff,0xaaaaaaaa,0x55555555,0xf5f5f5f5,0xA5A5A5A5,0xffff0000}, set data_wr=chk_val[j]; inner write loop i=0..48: addr=addr_array[i]; if skip_array[i]==1 continue; if write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 continue; else write_reg(addr,(data_wr & write_mask_array[i])); 3) Readback loop i=0..48: if skip_array[i]==1 continue; if write_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 continue; if read_mask_array[i]==0x00000000 continue; else read data_rd=(read_reg(addr) & read_mask_array[i]); compute wr_n=(write_mask_array[i] ^ 0xffffffff); compute exp_val=((data_wr & read_mask_array[i] & write_mask_array[i]) | (wr_n & read_mask_array[i] & default_value_array[i])); if data_rd==exp_val then PASS else wr_fail_cnt++ and print mismatch; 4) At end of test_case(): if(def_fail_cnt>0 || wr_fail_cnt>0) finish(1) else finish(0)
Validation / Acceptance Criteria: - Default value check: (read_reg(addr) & 0xfffffffe) == default_value_array[i]; - Write/read check per address and pattern: data_rd == ((data_wr & read_mask & write_mask) | (~write_mask & read_mask & default_value)); - Final pass: def_fail_cnt==0 && wr_fail_cnt==0
Gap Analysis: - VRRW and certain group registers skipped as per skip_array/skip_rst_array; - No negative tests for invalid addresses; - No error handling for read/write failures beyond counters; - Soft reset check is compiled out (#ifdef 0)
